meta.notes: Draft moves are preview data only until authenticated write routes are enabled.

rules: All drag-and-drop changes are staged in draft mode before publication.
Publish is blocked when a move creates a blocking conflict.
Undo/restage should preserve an audit trail of who moved what and why.
Supervisor/admin override notes are required when publishing with warnings.
